title: ToolCallContext
description: The evaluation input provided to policies at the Tool Call Interception point.

tool_name.description: The name of the tool the LLM has requested to invoke.

arguments.description: The arguments provided by the LLM for the tool invocation.

role.description: Always 'assistant' — this is the message that produced the tool call.

content.description: The text content of the assistant message that triggered the tool call.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent that owns this session.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the current session.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the interception occurred.
